name: World of Hyatt Business Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 70,000 World of Hyatt bonus points after spending $7,000 on purchases within the first 3 months of account opening.
notes: Official Chase/Hyatt issuer evidence now shows the World of Hyatt Business offer at 70,000 bonus points after $7,000 in the first 3 months.
Hyatt issuer page/search result states the 70k business offer ends August 20, 2026; this replaces the prior 60k/$5k standard offer.

earning_rates.notes: 9x total points per $1 (4x from card + 5x as Discoverist) at Hyatt properties

other_benefits.name: Automatic Hyatt Discoverist Status
other_benefits.description: Hyatt Discoverist status through the business card

other_benefits.name: 5 Tier-Qualifying Nights
other_benefits.description: 5 bonus tier-qualifying nights credited each year

other_benefits.name: Employee Cards Bonus
other_benefits.description: Employee cards at no additional cost

sources.notes: Official Chase World of Hyatt card page showing 70k/$7k business offer.
Official Hyatt World of Hyatt credit-card page; shows 70k business offer ending August 20, 2026.

notes: Business version of World of Hyatt. $199 annual fee, Hyatt business benefits, and current elevated public welcome offer of 70,000 points after $7,000/3mo (offer ends 2026-08-20 per Hyatt issuer page).

recurring_credits.name: Anniversary Free Night
recurring_credits.description: Anniversary Free Night Award at any Hyatt Category 1-4 property (15,000-point value).

recurring_credits.name: DoorDash Non-Restaurant Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10 off one qualifying non-restaurant DoorDash order each calendar quarter (DashMart, 7-Eleven, CVS, Safeway, etc.). Requires active DashPass enrollment. Per Chase cobrand-doordash terms.
